const info = $input.first().json;
throw new Error('MISSING FAMILY TAG: Document "' + info.title + '" (ID: ' + info.document_id + ') has no family tag. Tags found: [' + info.tag_names.join(', ') + ']. Please add a family tag (e.g., morrison, johnson) in Paperless and re-trigger.');
